basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) Recruitment 2026 for post of Assistant Librarian. Candidates with M.Lib Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Guwahati official website iima.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) with NET/SLET/SET qualified.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
